headline: Can Bristol Myers' Growth Portfolio Offset Legacy Drug Declines?
summary: BMY's growth portfolio now drives more than half of revenues, with strong gains from Reblozyl, Breyanzi and Cobenfy helping offset legacy drug declines.

headline: Bristol Myers Squibb’s AI Overhaul And Oncology Trials Shape Value Story
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (NYSE:BMY) is rolling out an AI driven overhaul of its procurement operations, using tools designed to shorten sourcing timelines and reshape internal buying processes. The company is also expanding its oncology footprint through a new non exclusive clinical collaboration with Arcus Biosciences that focuses on late stage cancer drug trials. These developments come alongside earlier attention on product approvals, clinical milestones, and access programs, which have...
